expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Management",
  "branchName": "add-task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses: pending, in progress, done",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'",
      "description": "As developer, add status column to tasks so each task stores a status.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Database migration adds 'status' column to tasks with default 'pending'",
        "Existing tasks set to 'pending' after migration",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["db/migrations/*_add_task_status.sql", "src/models/task.py"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As user, change task status from list; backend persists status change.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend exposes endpoint to update task status",
        "Status updates persist to DB and return updated task",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/services/task_service.py", "src/api/tasks.py"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "As user, see badge on each task card showing status.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display status badge with values Pending, In Progress, Done",
        "Badge color matches design tokens",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/components/taskCard.tsx", "src/ui/styles/badges.css"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "As user, change status inline from task row (dropdown or menu).",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Status control present in task row and updates status on selection",
        "Control is accessible (keyboard + screen reader)",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/components/taskRow.tsx", "src/ui/components/statusControl.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "As user, filter task list by status (All, Pending, In Progress, Done).",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list filter persists selection and filters results",
        "Filter options include All, Pending, In Progress, Done",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["src/ui/pages/taskList.tsx", "src/ui/components/filterBar.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
